content: Next.js 16 Cache Components: caching is fully opt-in only when the cacheComponents:true flag is set in next.config.ts AND 'use cache' directive is added per-route/component/function. This project's next.config.ts does NOT set cacheComponents:true and no 'use cache' directive exists anywhere in the codebase (grep confirmed) — meaning /configuracoes and the public /loja/[slug] route are both plain dynamic Server Components by default in Next 16, same as Next 15's default dynamic rendering absent PPR/ISR config. No stale-cache risk exists for slug-change-breaks-old-link (D-04) because there is no caching layer at all in this codebase yet, not because of an inverted-default mechanism.
